title: No Retreat, No Surrender 3: Blood Brothers
original_title: No Retreat, No Surrender 3: Blood Brothers
overview: Two feuding brothers (one a policeman, the other a martial arts expert) of different political views, join forces to avenge the death of their father, a retired agent, killed by the mafia.
